title: Keep It Real [STM]
description: Make Minecraft more realistic with beauty [Less Mods but Better Quality] A new Way of Minecraft Begins
body:
This time I present you "Keep It Real" Modpack.
Keep It Real is one of the most Beautiful Modpack in the Minecraft community.
its simply change the Minecraft world in real as possible.
by using 100+ Mods, 10+ texture packs and 4 Shaders support.
it create realistic mountains and more variety of biome and biome music.
its change texture of all blocks and the Gui.
this modpack didn't use any unnecessary mods.
its less but better.
this modpack contain sound mods, realistic mods, Gui mods, support mods and performance mods.
Beautiful Graphics with smooth performance.

-Estimated Minimum Requirement for 1080p at 60fps
CPU- AMD Ryzen 5 5600x or Intel Core i5-12400f Processor
GPU- Nvidia Geforce RTX 3060Ti or AMD Radeon RX 6700 XT
RAM- 16GB
Storage-1GB

Keep It Real has 2 Edition.

1]Colourful [its focus on beauty, vibrant colors, Unreal fantasy world]
2]Natural [its focus on realism, natural colors , realistic world]

You will find dozens of quality of life mods, visual changes, added ambience, and more, which will breathe life into your worlds and builds.

Also, please support the creators of all of these mods and added content! They make great stuff, go check them out!

make sure Hexabiome texture pack alway on top for proper use.

Modpack contain shader but if you want to use different shaders make sure they support Distant Horizon mod

And make sure
Graphics , clouds , Weather and leaves are in fancy quality

 

A new way of Minecraft Begins

Enjoy the "[Keep It Real] Modpack".

 

THANKS FOR DOWNLOADING.
